subtitle: Platform & DevOps Engineer specialising in Kubernetes, cloud security, and AI-driven infrastructure automation.
paragraphs: I'm a Platform and DevOps Engineer focused on building secure, automated infrastructure at scale. My core expertise spans Kubernetes orchestration and security, Infrastructure as Code with Terraform, and cloud platforms — primarily AWS and Azure.

I design and operate internal developer platforms, CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, and GitOps workflows with ArgoCD. I run a production-grade 6-node Kubernetes homelab with full observability, policy enforcement, and secrets management — the same patterns I apply to enterprise environments.

I'm increasingly leveraging AI to accelerate infrastructure automation — from intelligent alerting and anomaly detection to AI-assisted IaC generation and deployment workflows. I believe the intersection of platform engineering and AI is where the most impactful DevOps work is happening.

highlights.title: Kubernetes & Security
highlights.description: Production K8s clusters with Kyverno policies, Vault secrets, network policies, and RBAC hardening.

highlights.title: Infrastructure as Code
highlights.description: Terraform, CloudFormation, and Ansible — everything defined, versioned, and automated.

highlights.title: Platform Engineering
highlights.description: Internal developer platforms with self-service namespaces, GitOps, and policy-as-code guardrails.

highlights.title: CI/CD & GitHub Actions
highlights.description: End-to-end pipelines with GitHub Actions, Trivy scanning, Harbor registry, and ArgoCD deployments.

highlights.title: Cloud — AWS & Azure
highlights.description: Multi-cloud architecture across AWS and Azure with cost optimisation and security best practices.

highlights.title: AI & Automation
highlights.description: Leveraging AI for intelligent monitoring, IaC generation, and automated incident response.
